data.title: Wayfair introduces new Discover and Image Search features to its app
data.description: Discover and Image Search will play important roles for Wayfair customers as the retailer leverages artificial intelligence.

data.title: American Rebel Beer sees big online sales surge ahead of July 4
data.description: The company the surge to recent digital investments, including improvements to the online checkout process and the introduction of flat-rate and free shipping options.

data.title: MedWell Ai rebrands and restructures with AI and B2B ecommerce
data.description: The company's B2B ecommerce platform (MedWellUSA.com) currently offers more than 80 pharmaceutical and wellness products.

data.title: Clorox taps ERP and ecommerce to navigate consumer volatility
data.description: Speaking at the Deutsche Bank dbAccess Global Consumer Conference, Clorox chair and CEO Linda Rendle described how technology investments are helping the consumer goods maker navigate slowing category growth.

data.title: David's Bridal introduces agentic wedding planner features in beta
data.description: The updates to David's Bridal's Pearl offering will an early test for agentic commerce in wedding planning.
